title: calonemorchis rigida
intro_study: According to "Phytotherapy research : PTR", calonemorchis rigida benefits include its ability to exhibit immunostimulatory activity, particularly through its insoluble fraction, which can potentially be used as an immunostimulatory agent in humans.
side_effects: Calonemorchis rigida can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and gastrointestinal issues in some individuals. Prolonged or excessive consumption of the plant's extracts can lead to dizziness, nausea, and headaches. In rare cases, it may cause liver or kidney damage if not used under proper medical supervision. Additionally, using Calonemorchis rigida in combination with other medications can increase the risk of adverse interactions.
